behaviors.description: The evaluate-stage command stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact.
behaviors.justification: This is primarily a module handoff/wiring risk (stage command -> artifact writer -> artifact key selection). Unit tests on a single function can miss miswired artifact routing. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real external contract/round-trip side effect outside the local artifact subsystem. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because correctness here is key/slot targeting, not model judgment or multi-agentic sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Run evaluate-stage through the real stage pipeline with the real in-process artifact repository, then assert `grounding` is created/updated and `plan` is unchanged for that write path.

behaviors.description: The implement-stage flow reads grounding when available and still writes its execution output to `plan`.
behaviors.justification: This tests orchestration across components: artifact read path plus implement output write path. Unit-only tests can miss wiring/state propagation failures. Rejected Agentic because behavior text focuses on presence/usage of grounding and destination artifact write, not quality of model-generated content. Rejected Workflow because no explicit requirement for multiple model-dependent decisions across steps.
behaviors.test_description: Execute implement-stage with pre-seeded `grounding` in the same run context using real in-process storage; assert grounding is consumed by implement input path and resulting artifact write lands in `plan` only.

behaviors.description: Deep-dive no longer overwrites `plan` as a redundant side effect when diagnosis already exists in issue content.
behaviors.justification: Risk is unintended side effect across stage logic and artifact persistence, which is beyond a single function boundary. Rejected Agentic because the asserted outcome is absence of a write side effect (`plan` not overwritten), not evaluation quality of model output. Rejected System because no explicit external contract check or external round-trip boundary is required.
behaviors.test_description: Run deep-dive with issue content containing diagnosis in an integration harness with real artifact store state; assert no `plan` overwrite occurs while other expected deep-dive outputs remain intact.

behaviors.description: Artifact lineage is preserved so implement can read the `grounding` artifact produced earlier in the same run context.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module state lineage within a run context (producer stage -> storage -> consumer stage). Unit tests can miss context keying/session lineage bugs. Rejected Workflow because behavior text requires lineage continuity, not multi-step model decision correctness. Rejected Agentic because reading prior artifact is deterministic state plumbing.
behaviors.test_description: In one integration run context, execute the grounding-producing stage then implement-stage using the same context identifiers; assert implement resolves the exact earlier `grounding` artifact instance.

behaviors.description: In a full multi-step agent run (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`), the final implementation plan reflects grounding produced earlier in the run.
behaviors.justification: This explicitly requires a full multi-step agentic sequence and cross-step dependence of later output on earlier grounding. Unit/Integration with stubs can validate wiring but cannot validate that sequential model-driven stages preserve and use grounding in the final plan. Rejected Agentic because the behavior is not a single model output; it is end-to-end multi-step dependence across stages.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real chain end-to-end with real model calls across `deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`, then verify the final implement `plan` materially incorporates grounding content created earlier in that same run context.

behaviors.description: When grounding is absent, implement falls back safely and still emits a valid plan artifact without corrupting other stored artifacts.
behaviors.justification: This is fallback/orchestration and artifact integrity across modules (missing input branch + output write + non-target artifact preservation). Unit tests may miss repository interaction side effects. Rejected System because no explicit real external contract/round-trip boundary is required. Rejected Agentic because assertion is fallback safety and storage correctness, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke implement-stage in an integration harness with no `grounding` artifact present; assert a valid `plan` artifact is emitted and pre-existing unrelated artifacts remain unchanged.
